title: campylospermum longestipulatum
intro: Campylospermum longestipulatum, also known as the Long-stipled Campylospermum, is a species of plant in the family Ochnaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Campylospermum longestipulatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
